tEn: RT-1: Robotics Transformer for Real-World Control at Scale
tZh: RT-1：面向大规模真实世界控制的机器人Transformer
sEn: RT-1 shows that large-scale, diverse robotic data combined with high-capacity Transformer models enables strong generalization in real-world robot control.
sZh: RT-1表明，大规模多样化机器人数据与高容量Transformer模型相结合，能够在真实世界机器人控制中实现强大的泛化能力。
absEn: By transferring knowledge from large, diverse, task-agnostic datasets, modern machine learning models can solve specific downstream tasks either zero-shot or with small task-specific datasets to a high level of performance. While this capability has been demonstrated in other fields such as computer vision, natural language processing or speech recognition, it remains to be shown in robotics, where the generalization capabilities of the models are particularly critical due to the difficulty of collecting real-world robotic data. We argue that one of the keys to the success of such general robotic models lies with open-ended task-agnostic training, combined with high-capacity architectures that can absorb all of the diverse, robotic data. In this paper, we present a model class, dubbed Robotics Transformer, that exhibits promising scalable model properties. We verify our conclusions in a study of different model classes and their ability to generalize as a function of the data size, model size, and data diversity based on a large-scale data collection on real robots performing real-world tasks. The project's website and videos can be found at robotics-transformer1.github.io
absZh: 通过从大规模、多样化、任务无关的数据集中迁移知识，现代机器学习模型可以零样本或使用少量特定任务数据集解决下游任务，并达到高水平性能。虽然这种能力已在计算机视觉、自然语言处理或语音识别等其他领域得到验证，但在机器人领域尚未得到证实，而由于收集真实世界机器人数据的困难，模型的泛化能力在该领域尤为关键。我们认为，这种通用机器人模型成功的关键之一在于开放式的任务无关训练，结合能够吸收所有多样化机器人数据的高容量架构。在本文中，我们提出了一类名为Robotics Transformer的模型，它展现出有前景的可扩展模型特性。我们基于真实机器人执行真实世界任务的大规模数据收集，研究了不同模型类别及其随数据量、模型大小和数据多样性的泛化能力，从而验证了我们的结论。项目网站和视频可在robotics-transformer1.github.io找到。

contrib.en: Proposes RT-1, a Transformer-based model for real-world robotic control at scale.
contrib.zh: 提出RT-1，一种基于Transformer的模型，用于大规模真实世界机器人控制。

contrib.en: Demonstrates RT-1 achieves 97% success on over 700 training instructions.
contrib.zh: 展示RT-1在超过700个训练指令上达到97%的成功率。

contrib.en: Shows RT-1 generalizes to new tasks, distractors, and backgrounds significantly better than baselines.
contrib.zh: 显示RT-1在新任务、干扰物和背景上的泛化能力显著优于基线。

contrib.en: Integrates TokenLearner and FiLM conditioning for efficient real-time inference.
contrib.zh: 集成TokenLearner和FiLM条件化以实现高效的实时推理。

contrib.en: Demonstrates absorption of heterogeneous data from simulation and different robots without performance loss.
contrib.zh: 展示RT-1吸收来自仿真和不同机器人的异构数据而不损失性能。

contrib.en: Enables long-horizon tasks with up to 50 steps in the SayCan framework.
contrib.zh: 在SayCan框架中实现多达50步的长时域任务。

limits.en: RT-1 is an imitation learning method, limited by demonstrator performance.
limits.zh: RT-1是一种模仿学习方法，受限于演示者的表现。

limits.en: Generalization to new instructions is limited to combinations of seen concepts.
limits.zh: 对新指令的泛化仅限于已见概念的组合。

limits.en: Method is evaluated on a large but not highly dexterous set of manipulation tasks.
limits.zh: 该方法在大量但非高度灵巧的操作任务上评估。

limits.en: Robustness to backgrounds and environments could be improved with more diverse data.
limits.zh: 对背景和环境的鲁棒性可通过更多样化的数据改进。

limits.en: Reaction speed and context retention could benefit from scalable attention and memory.
limits.zh: 反应速度和上下文保持可通过可扩展的注意力和记忆改进。

items.en: By transferring knowledge from large, diverse, task-agnostic datasets, modern machine learning models can solve specific downstream tasks either zero-shot or with small task-specific datasets to a high level of performance. While this capability has been demonstrated in other fields such as computer vision, natural language processing or speech recognition, it remains to be shown in robotics, where the generalization capabilities of the models are particularly critical due to the difficulty of collecting real-world robotic data. We argue that one of the keys to the success of such general robotic models lies with open-ended task-agnostic training, combined with high-capacity architectures that can absorb all of the diverse, robotic data. In this paper, we present a model class, dubbed Robotics Transformer, that exhibits promising scalable model properties. We verify our conclusions in a study of different model classes and their ability to generalize as a function of the data size, model size, and data diversity based on a large-scale data collection on real robots performing real-world tasks. The project’s website and videos can be found at robotics-transformer1.github.io
items.zh: 通过从大规模、多样化的、与任务无关的数据集中迁移知识，现代机器学习模型可以零样本或使用少量特定任务数据集解决具体的下游任务，并达到高水平性能。虽然这种能力已在计算机视觉、自然语言处理或语音识别等其他领域得到验证，但在机器人领域仍有待证明，因为收集真实世界机器人数据的难度使得模型的泛化能力尤为关键。我们认为，这种通用机器人模型成功的关键之一在于开放式、与任务无关的训练，结合能够吸收所有多样化机器人数据的高容量架构。在本文中，我们提出了一类名为 Robotics Transformer 的模型，它展现出有前景的可扩展模型特性。我们基于真实机器人执行真实世界任务的大规模数据收集，通过研究不同模型类别及其随数据量、模型大小和数据多样性的泛化能力，验证了我们的结论。项目网站和视频请见 robotics-transformer1.github.io

items.en: ∗Robotics at Google, †Everyday Robots, ‡Google Research, Brain Team
items.zh: *Google Robotics, †Everyday Robots, ‡Google Research, Brain Team

items.en: End-to-end robotic learning, with either imitation or reinforcement, typically involves collecting task-specific data in either single-task (Kalashnikov et al., 2018; Zhang et al., 2018) or multi-task (Kalashnikov et al., 2021b; Jang et al., 2021) settings that are narrowly tailored to the tasks that the robot should perform. This workflow mirrors the classic approach to supervised learning in other domains, such as computer vision and NLP, where task-specific datasets would be collected, labeled, and deployed to solve individual tasks, with little interplay between the tasks themselves. Recent years have seen a transformation in vision, NLP, and other domains, away from siloed, small-scale datasets and models and towards large, general models pre-trained on broad, large datasets. The keys to the success of such models lie with open-ended task-agnostic training, combined with high-capacity architectures that can absorb all of the knowledge present in large-scale datasets. If a model can “sponge up” experience to learn general patterns in language or perception, then it can bring them to bear on individual tasks more efficiently. While removing the need for large task-specific datasets is appealing generally in supervised learning, it is even more critical in robotics, where datasets might require engineering-heavy autonomous operation or expensive human demonstrations. We therefore ask: can we train a single, capable, large multi-task backbone model on data consisting of a wide variety of robotic tasks? And does such a model enjoy the benefits observed in other domains, exhibiting zero-shot generalization to new tasks, environments, and objects?
items.zh: 端到端机器人学习，无论是通过模仿还是强化学习，通常涉及在单任务（Kalashnikov et al., 2018; Zhang et al., 2018）或多任务（Kalashnikov et al., 2021b; Jang et al., 2021）设置中收集特定任务数据，这些数据严格针对机器人应执行的任务。这种工作流程类似于其他领域（如计算机视觉和自然语言处理）中经典的监督学习方法，即收集、标注特定任务数据集并部署以解决单个任务，任务之间几乎没有交互。近年来，视觉、自然语言处理和其他领域经历了从孤立的小规模数据集和模型向大规模、通用模型的转变，这些模型在广泛的大型数据集上进行预训练。这类模型成功的关键在于开放式、与任务无关的训练，结合能够吸收大规模数据集中所有知识的高容量架构。如果模型能够“吸收”经验以学习语言或感知中的通用模式，那么它就能更高效地将这些模式应用于单个任务。虽然消除对大型特定任务数据集的需求在监督学习中普遍具有吸引力，但在机器人领域更为关键，因为数据集可能需要工程密集型的自主操作或昂贵的人类演示。因此，我们提出疑问：能否在包含各种机器人任务的数据上训练一个单一的、有能力的、大型多任务骨干模型？这样的模型是否享有其他领域观察到的优势，即对新任务、新环境和新物体展现出零样本泛化能力？

items.en: Building such models in robotics is not easy. Although recent years have seen several large multi-task robot policies proposed in the literature (Reed et al., 2022; Jang et al., 2021), such models often have limited breadth of real-world tasks, as with Gato (Reed et al., 2022), or focus on training tasks rather than generalization to new tasks, as with recent instruction following methods (Shridhar et al., 2021; 2022), or attain comparatively lower performance on new tasks (Jang et al., 2021).
items.zh: 在机器人领域构建这样的模型并不容易。尽管近年来文献中提出了几个大型多任务机器人策略（Reed et al., 2022; Jang et al., 2021），但这些模型通常对真实世界任务的广度有限，例如 Gato（Reed et al., 2022），或者侧重于训练任务而非对新任务的泛化，例如最近的指令跟随方法（Shridhar et al., 2021; 2022），或者在新任务上性能相对较低（Jang et al., 2021）。

items.capEn: (a) RT-1 takes images and natural language instructions and outputs discretized base and arm actions. Despite its size (35M parameters), it does this at 3 Hz, due to its efficient yet high-capacity architecture: a FiLM (Perez et al., 2018) conditioned EfficientNet (Tan & Le, 2019), a TokenLearner (Ryoo et al., 2021), and a Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017).
items.capZh: (a) RT-1 接收图像和自然语言指令，输出离散化的基座和手臂动作。尽管其规模较大（3500万参数），但由于其高效且高容量的架构（一个由 FiLM（Perez et al., 2018）调节的 EfficientNet（Tan & Le, 2019）、一个 TokenLearner（Ryoo et al., 2021）和一个 Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017）），它能够以 3 Hz 的频率运行。

items.capEn: (b) RT-1’s large-scale, real-world training (130k demonstrations) and evaluation (3000 real-world trials) show impressive generalization, robustness, and ability to learn from diverse data.
items.capZh: (b) RT-1 的大规模真实世界训练（13万次演示）和评估（3000次真实世界试验）展示了令人印象深刻的泛化能力、鲁棒性以及从多样化数据中学习的能力。

items.en: The two main challenges lie in assembling the right dataset and designing the right model. While data collection and curation is often the “unsung hero” of many large-scale machine learning projects (Radford et al., 2021; Ramesh et al., 2021), this is especially true in robotics, where datasets are often robot-specific and gathered manually (Dasari et al., 2019; Ebert et al., 2021). As we will show in our evaluations, good generalization requires datasets that combine both scale and breadth, covering a variety of tasks and settings. At the same time, the tasks in the dataset should be sufficiently well-connected to enable generalization, such that the model can discover the patterns between structural similar tasks and perform new tasks that combine those patterns in novel ways. We utilize a dataset that we gathered over the course of 17 months with a fleet of 13 robots, containing ∼similar-to\sim130k episodes and over 700 tasks, and we ablate various aspects of this dataset in our evaluation.
items.zh: 两个主要挑战在于组装正确的数据集和设计正确的模型。虽然数据收集和整理通常是许多大规模机器学习项目的“无名英雄”（Radford et al., 2021; Ramesh et al., 2021），但在机器人领域尤其如此，因为数据集通常是机器人特定的且手动收集（Dasari et al., 2019; Ebert et al., 2021）。正如我们将在评估中展示的，良好的泛化需要结合规模和广度的数据集，涵盖各种任务和场景。同时，数据集中的任务应具有足够的关联性以实现泛化，使模型能够发现结构相似任务之间的模式，并以新颖方式组合这些模式来执行新任务。我们利用一个在17个月内由13台机器人组成的车队收集的数据集，包含约13万个片段和超过700个任务，并在评估中消融了该数据集的各个方面。

items.en: The second challenge lies in the design of the model itself. Effective robotic multi-task learning requires a high capacity model, and Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) models excel in this regard, particularly when it is necessary to learn many tasks conditioned, as in our case, on language instructions. However, robotic controllers must also be efficient enough to run in real time, which presents a major challenge for Transformers in particular. We propose a novel architecture that we call RT-1 (Robotics Transformer 1), which by encoding high-dimensional inputs and outputs, including camera images, instructions and motor commands into compact token representations to be used by the Transformer, allows for efficient inference at runtime to make real-time control feasible.
items.zh: 第二个挑战在于模型本身的设计。有效的机器人多任务学习需要高容量模型，而 Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017）模型在这方面表现出色，特别是在需要学习许多任务（如我们的情况，基于语言指令）时。然而，机器人控制器还必须足够高效以实时运行，这对 Transformer 来说是一个重大挑战。我们提出了一种新颖的架构，称为 RT-1（Robotics Transformer 1），通过将高维输入和输出（包括相机图像、指令和电机指令）编码为紧凑的 token 表示供 Transformer 使用，从而在运行时实现高效推理，使实时控制成为可能。

items.en: Our contribution is the RT-1 model and experiments with this model on a large and broad dataset of real-world robotic tasks. Our experiments not only demonstrate that RT-1 can exhibit significantly improved generalization and robustness compared to prior techniques, but also evaluate and ablate many design choices in both the model and in the composition of the training set. Our results show that RT-1 can perform over 700 training instructions at 97% success rate, and can generalize to new tasks, distractors, and backgrounds 25%, 36% and 18% better than the next best baseline, respectively. This level of performance allows us to execute very long-horizon tasks in the SayCan (Ahn et al., 2022) framework, with as many as 50 stages. We further show that RT-1 can incorporate data from simulation or even other robot types, retaining performance on the original tasks and improving generalization to new scenarios. A short overview of RT-1 capabilities is presented in Fig. 1(b)222Helper robots shown in Fig. 1-5 are from Everyday Robots.
items.zh: 我们的贡献在于 RT-1 模型以及在该模型上使用大规模、广泛的真实世界机器人任务数据集进行的实验。我们的实验不仅证明了 RT-1 相比先前技术具有显著改进的泛化能力和鲁棒性，还评估和消融了模型和训练集组成的许多设计选择。我们的结果表明，RT-1 能够以 97% 的成功率执行超过 700 个训练指令，并且在新任务、干扰物和背景上的泛化能力分别比次优基线高出 25%、36% 和 18%。这种性能水平使我们能够在 SayCan（Ahn et al., 2022）框架中执行非常长视界的任务，最多可达 50 个阶段。我们进一步表明，RT-1 可以吸收来自仿真甚至其他机器人类型的数据，保持原始任务的性能并提高对新场景的泛化能力。图 1(b) 简要概述了 RT-1 的能力。

items.en: A number of recent works have proposed Transformer-based policies for robotic control. As in RT-1, several works use language commands processed with Transformers as a robust framework for specifying and generalizing to new tasks (Zhang & Chai, 2021; Pashevich et al., 2021; Silva et al., 2021; Jang et al., 2021; Ahn et al., 2022; Nair et al., 2022). Our work takes the application of Transformers a step further and treats the mapping of language and vision observations to robot actions as a sequence modelling problem, using a Transformer to learn this mapping. This idea is directly inspired by successes in game-playing (Chen et al., 2021; Lee et al., 2022a) as well as simulated robot navigation (Fang et al., 2019), locomotion (Janner et al., 2021; Gupta et al., 2022), and manipulation (Jiang et al., 2022) environments. We note that several of these works go beyond only text conditioning and use Transformers to also generalize across robot morphologies (e.g., Gupta et al. (2022)) and other modalities for task specifications (e.g., Jang et al. (2021); Jiang et al. (2022)). These extensions are promising future directions for RT-1.
items.zh: 最近许多工作提出了基于 Transformer 的机器人控制策略。与 RT-1 类似，一些工作使用 Transformer 处理的语言命令作为指定和泛化新任务的鲁棒框架（Zhang & Chai, 2021; Pashevich et al., 2021; Silva et al., 2021; Jang et al., 2021; Ahn et al., 2022; Nair et al., 2022）。我们的工作将 Transformer 的应用更进一步，将语言和视觉观测到机器人动作的映射视为一个序列建模问题，使用 Transformer 学习这一映射。这一想法直接受到游戏（Chen et al., 2021; Lee et al., 2022a）以及仿真机器人导航（Fang et al., 2019）、运动（Janner et al., 2021; Gupta et al., 2022）和操作（Jiang et al., 2022）环境成功的启发。我们注意到，其中一些工作不仅限于文本条件，还使用 Transformer 跨机器人形态（例如，Gupta et al. (2022)）和其他任务规范模态（例如，Jang et al. (2021); Jiang et al. (2022)）进行泛化。这些扩展是 RT-1 有前景的未来方向。

items.en: Beyond Transformer-based policies, the focus of our work is on generalizable and robust real-world robotic manipulation at scale. Existing works on real-world Transformer-based robotic manipulation focus on efficiently learning tasks from a set of demonstrations per task (Shridhar et al., 2022). Behavior Transformer (Shafiullah et al., 2022) and Gato (Reed et al., 2022) advocate for training a single model on large-scale robotic and non-robotic datasets. However, these works are limited in their real-world robotic tasks; e.g., Gato learns effectively a single task (colored block stacking) without evaluating generalization to new tasks or a variety of real-world settings. On the technical side, our work examines how Transformer-based policies can be built so as to combine high capacity and generalization with the computational efficiency necessary for real-time control.
items.zh: 除了基于 Transformer 的策略，我们工作的重点在于大规模、可泛化和鲁棒的真实世界机器人操作。现有关于真实世界基于 Transformer 的机器人操作的工作侧重于从每个任务的一组演示中高效学习任务（Shridhar et al., 2022）。Behavior Transformer（Shafiullah et al., 2022）和 Gato（Reed et al., 2022）主张在大型机器人和非机器人数据集上训练单一模型。然而，这些工作在真实世界机器人任务方面有限；例如，Gato 有效地学习了一个单一任务（彩色积木堆叠），没有评估对新任务或各种真实世界设置的泛化能力。在技术方面，我们的工作研究了如何构建基于 Transformer 的策略，以结合高容量和泛化能力与实时控制所需的计算效率。

items.en: While the use of high-capacity Transformer models to learn robotic control policies is a fairly recent innovation, robotics has a long history of multi-task and language-conditioned learning, and RT-1 builds on these foundations. A significant body of work deals with learning policies and predictive models for robotic grasping (Saxena et al., 2006; Lenz et al., 2015; Pinto & Gupta, 2016; Gupta et al., 2018; Viereck et al., 2017), with the aim of generalizing to new objects. Prior works have sought to address robotic language understanding through pipelined approaches that combine language parsing, vision, and robotic control (MacMahon et al., 2006; Kollar et al., 2010; Tellex et al., 2011) and with end-to-end approaches (Mei et al., 2016; Stepputtis et al., 2020; Lynch & Sermanet, 2020; Ahn et al., 2022). Multi-task robotic learning has also been approached from the perspective of learning to reach goals (Chung et al., 2015; Raffin et al., 2019; Jurgenson et al., 2020; Huang et al., 2020), as well as learning policies that can perform tasks in a discrete set or some other parameterized form (Deisenroth et al., 2014; Devin et al., 2017; Fox et al., 2019; Kalashnikov et al., 2021a). A number of prior works in robotics have also focused on collecting datasets containing demonstrations or trials that illustrate a variety of different tasks (Sharma et al., 2018; Dasari et al., 2019; Yu et al., 2020; Singh et al., 2020; James et al., 2020). Our work adds further evidence in support of the power of multi-task, language-conditioned robotic learning, presenting experimental results at a larger scale and with a greater variety of behaviors, objects, and scenes and proposing new architectures and design choices that enable robotic learning at a significantly larger scale.
items.zh: 虽然使用高容量 Transformer 模型学习机器人控制策略是相当近期的创新，但机器人领域在多任务和语言条件学习方面有着悠久的历史，RT-1 建立在这些基础之上。大量工作涉及学习机器人抓取（Saxena et al., 2006; Lenz et al., 2015; Pinto & Gupta, 2016; Gupta et al., 2018; Viereck et al., 2017）的策略和预测模型，旨在泛化到新物体。先前的工作试图通过结合语言解析、视觉和机器人控制的流水线方法（MacMahon et al., 2006; Kollar et al., 2010; Tellex et al., 2011）以及端到端方法（Mei et al., 2016; Stepputtis et al., 2020; Lynch & Sermanet, 2020; Ahn et al., 2022）来解决机器人语言理解问题。多任务机器人学习也从学习达到目标（Chung et al., 2015; Raffin et al., 2019; Jurgenson et al., 2020; Huang et al., 2020）以及学习能够执行离散集或其他参数化形式任务的策略（Deisenroth et al., 2014; Devin et al., 2017; Fox et al., 2019; Kalashnikov et al., 2021a）的角度进行了研究。机器人领域的许多先前工作也专注于收集包含各种不同任务演示或试验的数据集（Sharma et al., 2018; Dasari et al., 2019; Yu et al., 2020; Singh et al., 2020; James et al., 2020）。我们的工作进一步证明了多任务、语言条件机器人学习的力量，在更大规模、更多样化的行为、物体和场景下展示了实验结果，并提出了新的架构和设计选择，使得机器人学习能够在显著更大的规模上进行。

items.en: We aim to learn robot policies to solve language-conditioned tasks from vision. Formally, we consider a sequential decision-making environment. At timestep t=0𝑡0t=0, the policy π𝜋\pi is presented with a language instruction i𝑖i and an initial image observation x0subscript𝑥0x_{0}. The policy produces an action distribution π(⋅|i,x0)\pi(\cdot~{}|~{}i,x_{0}) from which an action a0subscript𝑎0a_{0} is sampled and applied to the robot. This process continues, with the policy iteratively producing actions atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} by sampling from a learned distribution π(⋅|i,{xj}j=0t)\pi(\cdot~{}|~{}i,\{x_{j}\}_{j=0}^{t}) and applying those actions to the robot. The interaction ends when a termination condition is achieved. The full interaction i,{(xj,aj)}j=0T𝑖superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑥𝑗subscript𝑎𝑗𝑗0𝑇i,\{(x_{j},a_{j})\}_{j=0}^{T} from from the starting step t=0𝑡0t=0 to terminating step T𝑇T is referred to as an episode. At the end of an episode, the agent will be given a binary reward r∈{0,1}𝑟01r\in\{0,1\} indicating whether the robot performed the instruction i𝑖i. The goal is to learn a policy π𝜋\pi that maximizes the average reward, in expectation over a distribution of instructions, starting states x0subscript𝑥0x_{0}, and transition dynamics.
items.zh: 我们的目标是学习从视觉解决语言条件任务的机器人策略。形式上，我们考虑一个顺序决策环境。在时间步 t=0 时，策略 π 接收一个语言指令 i 和一个初始图像观测 x₀。策略产生一个动作分布 π(·|i, x₀)，从中采样动作 a₀ 并应用于机器人。这个过程持续进行，策略通过从学习到的分布 π(·|i, {xⱼ}ⱼ₌₀ᵗ) 中采样迭代产生动作 aₜ，并将这些动作应用于机器人。交互在达到终止条件时结束。从起始步 t=0 到终止步 T 的完整交互 i, {(xⱼ, aⱼ)}ⱼ₌₀ᵀ 称为一个片段。在片段结束时，智能体将获得一个二元奖励 r ∈ {0,1}，指示机器人是否执行了指令 i。目标是学习一个策略 π，最大化在指令分布、起始状态 x₀ 和转移动态上的期望平均奖励。

items.en: Transformers. RT-1 uses a Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) to parameterize the policy π𝜋\pi. Generally speaking, a Transformer is a sequence model mapping an input sequence {ξh}h=0Hsuperscriptsubscriptsubscript𝜉ℎℎ0𝐻\{\xi_{h}\}_{h=0}^{H} to an output sequence {yk}k=0Ksuperscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑦𝑘𝑘0𝐾\{y_{k}\}_{k=0}^{K} using combinations of self-attention layers and fully-connected neural networks. While Transformers were originally designed for text sequences, where each input ξjsubscript𝜉𝑗\xi_{j} and output yksubscript𝑦𝑘y_{k} represents a text token, they have been extended to images (Parmar et al., 2018) as well as other modalities (Lee et al., 2022a; Reed et al., 2022). As detailed in the next section, we parameterize π𝜋\pi by first mapping inputs i,{xj}j=0t𝑖superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑥𝑗𝑗0𝑡i,\{x_{j}\}_{j=0}^{t} to a sequence {ξh}h=0Hsuperscriptsubscriptsubscript𝜉ℎℎ0𝐻\{\xi_{h}\}_{h=0}^{H} and action outputs atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} to a sequence {yk}k=0Ksuperscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑦𝑘𝑘0𝐾\{y_{k}\}_{k=0}^{K} before using a Transformer to learn the mapping {ξh}h=0H→{yk}k=0K→superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝜉ℎℎ0𝐻superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑦𝑘𝑘0𝐾\{\xi_{h}\}_{h=0}^{H}\to\{y_{k}\}_{k=0}^{K}.
items.zh: Transformer。RT-1 使用 Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017）来参数化策略 π。一般来说，Transformer 是一个序列模型，使用自注意力层和全连接神经网络的组合将输入序列 {ξₕ}ₕ₌₀ᴴ 映射到输出序列 {yₖ}ₖ₌₀ᴷ。虽然 Transformer 最初是为文本序列设计的，其中每个输入 ξⱼ 和输出 yₖ 代表一个文本 token，但它们已被扩展到图像（Parmar et al., 2018）以及其他模态（Lee et al., 2022a; Reed et al., 2022）。如下一节所述，我们通过首先将输入 i, {xⱼ}ⱼ₌₀ᵗ 映射到序列 {ξₕ}ₕ₌₀ᴴ，将动作输出 aₜ 映射到序列 {yₖ}ₖ₌₀ᴷ，然后使用 Transformer 学习映射 {ξₕ}ₕ₌₀ᴴ → {yₖ}ₖ₌₀ᴷ 来参数化 π。

items.en: Imitation learning. Imitation learning methods train the policy π𝜋\pi on a dataset 𝒟𝒟\mathcal{D} of demonstrations (Pomerleau, 1988; Zhang et al., 2018; Jang et al., 2021). Specifically, we assume access to a dataset 𝒟={(i(n),{(xt(n),at(n))}t=0T(n))}n=0N𝒟superscriptsubscriptsuperscript𝑖𝑛superscriptsubscriptsuperscriptsubscript𝑥𝑡𝑛superscriptsubscript𝑎𝑡𝑛𝑡0superscript𝑇𝑛𝑛0𝑁\mathcal{D}=\{(i^{(n)},\{(x_{t}^{(n)},a_{t}^{(n)})\}_{t=0}^{T^{(n)}})\}_{n=0}^{N} of episodes, all of which are successful (i.e., have a final reward of 111). We learn π𝜋\pi using behavioral cloning (Pomerleau, 1988), which optimizes π𝜋\pi by minimizing the negative log-likelihood of actions atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} given the images and language instructions.
items.zh: 模仿学习。模仿学习方法在演示数据集 D 上训练策略 π（Pomerleau, 1988; Zhang et al., 2018; Jang et al., 2021）。具体来说，我们假设可以访问一个片段数据集 D = {(i⁽ⁿ⁾, {(xₜ⁽ⁿ⁾, aₜ⁽ⁿ⁾)}ₜ₌₀ᵀ⁽ⁿ⁾)}ₙ₌₀ᴺ，所有片段都是成功的（即最终奖励为 1）。我们使用行为克隆（Pomerleau, 1988）学习 π，通过最小化给定图像和语言指令下动作 aₜ 的负对数似然来优化 π。

items.en: The goal of this work is to build and demonstrate a general robot learning system that can absorb large amounts of data and generalize effectively. We use mobile manipulators from Everyday Robots333everydayrobots.com, which have a 7 degree-of-freedom arm, a two-fingered gripper, and a mobile base (see Fig. 2 (d)). To collect data and evaluate our method, we use three kitchen-based environments: two real office kitchens and a training environment modelled off these real kitchens. The training environment, shown in Fig. 2 (a), consists of partial counters and is constructed for large scale data collection. The two real environments, shown in Fig. 2 (b, c), have similar counter tops to the training environment, but vary in lighting, background, and full kitchen geometry (e.g., there may be a cabinet instead of a drawer or a sink may be visible). We evaluate the performance of our policies across these different environments, measuring the policy’s performance and ability to generalize.
items.zh: 本工作的目标是构建并展示一个能够吸收大量数据并有效泛化的通用机器人学习系统。我们使用 Everyday Robots 的移动操作机器人，其具有 7 自由度手臂、两指夹爪和移动基座（见图 2(d)）。为了收集数据和评估我们的方法，我们使用三个基于厨房的环境：两个真实的办公室厨房和一个模拟这些真实厨房的训练环境。训练环境如图 2(a) 所示，包含部分台面，专为大规模数据收集而构建。两个真实环境如图 2(b, c) 所示，具有与训练环境相似的台面，但在光照、背景和完整厨房几何结构（例如，可能有橱柜而不是抽屉，或可见水槽）上有所不同。我们评估策略在这些不同环境中的性能，衡量策略的性能和泛化能力。

items.en: Our training data consists of human-provided demonstrations, and we annotate each episode with a textual description of the instruction that the robot just performed. The instructions usually contain a verb and one or more nouns describing the target objects. To group these instructions together, we split them into a number of skills (e.g., verbs such as “pick”, “open” or “place upright”) and objects (e.g., nouns such as “coke can”, “apple”, or “drawer”). We describe the details of our data collection strategy at scale in Sec. 5.2. Our largest dataset contains over 130k individual demonstrations constituting over 700 distinct task instructions using a large variety of objects (see Fig. 2 (f)). We describe the details of the data collected in Sec. 5.2.
items.zh: 我们的训练数据包括人类提供的演示，我们为每个片段标注机器人刚刚执行的指令的文本描述。指令通常包含一个动词和一个或多个描述目标物体的名词。为了将这些指令分组，我们将它们拆分为若干技能（例如，动词如“拿起”、“打开”或“竖直放置”）和物体（例如，名词如“可乐罐”、“苹果”或“抽屉”）。我们在第 5.2 节中描述大规模数据收集策略的细节。我们最大的数据集包含超过 13 万个独立演示，涵盖超过 700 个不同的任务指令，使用了大量各种物体（见图 2(f)）。我们在第 5.2 节中描述收集数据的细节。

items.en: One of the main contributions of our system is the network architecture, Robotics Transformer 1 (RT-1), an efficient model that can absorb large amounts of data, effectively generalize, and output actions at real-time rates for practical robotic control. RT-1 takes a short sequence of images and a natural language instruction as input and outputs an action for the robot at each time step. To this end, the architecture (shown in Figure 1(a)) leverages several elements: first the images and text are processed via an ImageNet pretrained convolutional network (Tan & Le, 2019) conditioned on a pretrained embedding of the instruction via FiLM (Perez et al., 2018), followed by a Token Learner (Ryoo et al., 2021) to compute a compact set of tokens, and finally a Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) to attend over these tokens and produce discretized action tokens. The actions consist of seven dimensions for the arm movement (x, y, z, roll, pitch, yaw, opening of the gripper), three dimensions for base movement (x, y, yaw) and a discrete dimension to switch between three modes: controlling the arm, the base, or terminating the episode. RT-1 performs closed-loop control and commands actions at 333 Hz until it either yields a “terminate” action or hits a pre-set time step limit.
items.zh: 我们系统的主要贡献之一是网络架构 Robotics Transformer 1 (RT-1)，这是一个高效的模型，能够吸收大量数据，有效泛化，并以实时速率输出动作以用于实际机器人控制。RT-1 接收一个短序列的图像和自然语言指令作为输入，并在每个时间步输出机器人的动作。为此，架构（如图 1(a) 所示）利用了多个元素：首先，图像和文本通过一个基于 ImageNet 预训练的卷积网络（Tan & Le, 2019）处理，该网络通过 FiLM（Perez et al., 2018）以指令的预训练嵌入为条件；然后，通过 TokenLearner（Ryoo et al., 2021）计算一组紧凑的 token；最后，使用 Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017）关注这些 token 并产生离散化的动作 token。动作包括手臂运动的七个维度（x, y, z, roll, pitch, yaw, 夹爪开度）、基座运动的三个维度（x, y, yaw）以及一个离散维度用于在三种模式之间切换：控制手臂、控制基座或终止片段。RT-1 执行闭环控制，并以 3 Hz 的频率命令动作，直到产生“终止”动作或达到预设的时间步限制。

items.capEn: Figure 2: (a) Robot classroom where we collect data at scale; (b) a real office kitchen, one of the two realistic environments used for evaluation (named Kitchen1 in the rest of the paper); (c) a different office kitchen used for evaluation (named Kitchen2 in the rest of the paper); (d) mobile manipulator used throughout the paper; (e) a set of objects used for most of the skills to expand skill diversity; (f) a more diverse set of objects used mostly to expand object diversity of the picking skill.
items.capZh: 图 2: (a) 我们大规模收集数据的机器人教室；(b) 一个真实的办公室厨房，用于评估的两个真实环境之一（本文中称为 Kitchen1）；(c) 另一个用于评估的办公室厨房（本文中称为 Kitchen2）；(d) 本文中使用的移动操作机器人；(e) 用于大多数技能以扩展技能多样性的物体集；(f) 主要用于扩展拾取技能物体多样性的更多样化物体集。

items.en: In this section, we describe how we tokenize the images, text, and actions, and then discuss the RT-1 model architecture. We then describe how we attain the runtime speed required for real-time control. Lastly, we describe the data collection procedure and the skills and instructions in our dataset.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述如何对图像、文本和动作进行 token 化，然后讨论 RT-1 模型架构。接着，我们描述如何达到实时控制所需的运行时速度。最后，我们描述数据收集过程以及数据集中的技能和指令。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The architecture diagram of RT-1. The instruction is transformed into a USE embedding and used to condition a pre-trained EfficientNet via FiLM layers. The resulting vision-language tokens are reduced by the TokenLearner and fed into a decoder-only Transformer, which outputs tokenized actions.
items.capZh: 图3：RT-1的架构图。指令被转换为USE嵌入，并通过FiLM层用于调节预训练的EfficientNet。生成的视觉-语言令牌由TokenLearner缩减，并输入到仅解码器的Transformer中，该Transformer输出令牌化的动作。

items.en: Our model is built on a Transformer architecture (Vaswani et al., 2017) and takes a history of images and task description as input and directly outputs tokenized actions, as shown in Fig. 1(a) and in detail in Fig. 3. In the following we describe the components of the model, following the top-to-bottom order in Fig. 3. More detail on model selection at scale are provided in Appendix C.3.
items.zh: 我们的模型基于Transformer架构（Vaswani等人，2017），以图像历史记录和任务描述作为输入，直接输出令牌化的动作，如图1(a)和图3所示。下面我们按照图3中从上到下的顺序描述模型的组成部分。关于大规模模型选择的更多细节见附录C.3。

items.en: Instruction and image tokenization. The RT-1 architecture relies on a data-efficient and compact tokenization of images and language instruction. RT-1 tokenizes a history of 6 images by passing images through an ImageNet pretrained EfficientNet-B3 (Tan & Le, 2019) model, which takes 6 images of resolution 300×300300300300\times 300 as input and outputs a spatial feature map of shape 9×9×512995129\times 9\times 512 from the final convolutional layer. Unlike Reed et al. (2022), we do not patchify the images into visual tokens prior to feeding them to our Transformer backbone. We instead flatten the output feature map from the EfficientNet into 818181 visual tokens which are passed on to the later layers of the network.
items.zh: 指令和图像令牌化。RT-1架构依赖于数据高效且紧凑的图像和语言指令令牌化。RT-1通过将6张图像输入ImageNet预训练的EfficientNet-B3（Tan & Le, 2019）模型来令牌化图像历史记录，该模型以6张分辨率为300×300的图像作为输入，并从最后一个卷积层输出形状为9×9×512的空间特征图。与Reed等人（2022）不同，我们在将图像输入Transformer主干之前，不将其分割成视觉令牌。相反，我们将EfficientNet输出的特征图展平为81个视觉令牌，并将其传递到网络的后续层。

items.en: To include the language instruction, we condition the image tokenizer on the natural language instruction in the form of a pretrained language embedding, allowing extraction of task-relevant image features early on and improving performance of RT-1. The instruction is first embedded via Universal Sentence Encoder (Cer et al., 2018). This embedding is then used as input to identity-initialized FiLM layers (Perez et al., 2018) added to the pretrained EfficientNet to condition the image encoder. Normally, inserting a FiLM layer into the interior of a pretrained network would disrupt the intermediate activations and negate the benefit of using pretrained weights. To overcome this, we initialize the weights of the dense layers (fcsubscript𝑓𝑐f_{c} and hCsubscriptℎ𝐶h_{C}) which produce the FiLM affine transformation to zero, allowing the FiLM layer to initially act as an identity and preserve the function of the pretrained weights. We find that identity-initialized FiLM also produces better results when training with an EfficientNet initialized from scratch, without ImageNet pretraining, but it does not surpass the initialization described above. The architecture of the image tokenizer is presented in Fig. 3.
items.zh: 为了包含语言指令，我们以预训练语言嵌入的形式对图像令牌化器进行条件化，使其能够早期提取与任务相关的图像特征，从而提高RT-1的性能。指令首先通过通用句子编码器（Cer等人，2018）进行嵌入。然后，该嵌入被用作添加到预训练EfficientNet中的恒等初始化FiLM层（Perez等人，2018）的输入，以调节图像编码器。通常，在预训练网络内部插入FiLM层会破坏中间激活，并抵消使用预训练权重的优势。为了克服这一点，我们将产生FiLM仿射变换的密集层（fc和hC）的权重初始化为零，使得FiLM层最初充当恒等映射，从而保留预训练权重的功能。我们发现，即使在没有ImageNet预训练的情况下从头开始初始化EfficientNet，恒等初始化的FiLM也能产生更好的结果，但并未超过上述初始化方式。图像令牌化器的架构如图3所示。

items.en: RT-1’s image and instruction tokenization via FiLM EfficientNet-B3 is a total of 16M parameters, with 26 layers of MBConv blocks and FiLM layers, which output 81 vision-language tokens.
items.zh: RT-1通过FiLM EfficientNet-B3进行的图像和指令令牌化总共包含1600万个参数，具有26层MBConv块和FiLM层，输出81个视觉-语言令牌。

items.en: TokenLearner. To further compress the number of tokens that RT-1 needs to attend over and thus speed up inference, RT-1 uses TokenLearner (Ryoo et al., 2021). TokenLearner is an element-wise attention module that learns to map a large number of tokens into a much smaller number of tokens. This allows us to soft-select image tokens based on their information, passing only the important token combinations to the subsequent Transformer layers. The inclusion of TokenLearner subsamples the 818181 visual tokens that come out of the pre-trained FiLM-EfficientNet layers to just 888 final tokens that are then passed on to our Transformer layers.
items.zh: TokenLearner。为了进一步压缩RT-1需要关注的令牌数量，从而加速推理，RT-1使用了TokenLearner（Ryoo等人，2021）。TokenLearner是一种逐元素注意力模块，学习将大量令牌映射为更少数量的令牌。这使我们能够根据信息量软选择图像令牌，仅将重要的令牌组合传递给后续的Transformer层。TokenLearner的引入将预训练FiLM-EfficientNet层输出的81个视觉令牌子采样为仅8个最终令牌，然后传递给我们的Transformer层。

items.en: Transformer. These 8 tokens per-image are then concatenated with the other images in the history, forming 48 total tokens (with added position encoding) to be fed into the Transformer backbone of RT-1. The Transformer is a decoder-only sequence model with 8 self-attention layers and 19M total parameters that outputs action tokens.
items.zh: Transformer。每张图像的这8个令牌随后与历史记录中的其他图像拼接，形成总共48个令牌（加上位置编码），输入到RT-1的Transformer主干中。该Transformer是一个仅解码器的序列模型，包含8个自注意力层和1900万个参数，输出动作令牌。

items.en: Action tokenization. To tokenize actions, each action dimension in RT-1 is discretized into 256256256 bins. As mentioned previously, the action dimensions we consider include seven variables for the arm movement (x𝑥x, y𝑦y, z𝑧z, roll, pitch, yaw, opening of the gripper), three variables for base movement (x𝑥x, y𝑦y, yaw) and a discrete variable to switch between three modes: controlling arm, base or terminating the episode. For each variable, we map the target to one of the 256 bins, where the bins are uniformly distributed within the bounds of each variable.
items.zh: 动作令牌化。为了令牌化动作，RT-1中的每个动作维度被离散化为256个区间。如前所述，我们考虑的动作维度包括手臂运动的七个变量（x、y、z、翻滚、俯仰、偏航、夹爪开度）、底座运动的三个变量（x、y、偏航）以及一个用于在三种模式之间切换的离散变量：控制手臂、底座或终止回合。对于每个变量，我们将目标映射到256个区间之一，其中区间在每个变量的边界内均匀分布。

items.en: Loss. We use a standard categorical cross-entropy entropy objective and causal masking that was utilized in prior Transformer-based controllers (Reed et al., 2022; Lee et al., 2022a).
items.zh: 损失函数。我们使用标准的分类交叉熵损失和因果掩码，这在之前的基于Transformer的控制器中已有使用（Reed等人，2022；Lee等人，2022a）。

items.en: Inference speed. In contrast to many applications of large models, such as natural language or image generation, one of the unique requirements for a model that needs to run on real robots in real time is fast and consistent inference speed. Given the human speeds of executing the instructions considered in this work (which we measured to be in the 2−4242-4 secs range), we want the model to be not significantly slower than that. Based on our experiments this requirement corresponds to at least 333Hz control frequency and the resulting inference time budget for the model, given other latencies in the system, to be less than 100100100ms.
items.zh: 推理速度。与大型模型的许多应用（如自然语言或图像生成）不同，需要在真实机器人上实时运行的模型的一个独特要求是快速且一致的推理速度。考虑到本工作中执行的指令的人类速度（我们测量为2-4秒范围），我们希望模型的速度不会显著慢于此。根据我们的实验，这一要求对应于至少3Hz的控制频率，并且考虑到系统中的其他延迟，模型的推理时间预算应小于100毫秒。

items.en: This requirement limits the size of the model that we can use. We further explore the impact of model size on inference speed in the experiments. We employ two techniques to speed up inference: (i) reduce the number of tokens generated by a pre-trained EfficientNet model by using TokenLearner (Ryoo et al., 2021), (ii) compute these tokens only once and reuse them for the following windows that overlap for the future inferences. Both of these allow us to speed up the model inference by 2.42.42.4 and 1.71.71.7 times, respectively. Additional details on model inference are in Appendix C.1.
items.zh: 这一要求限制了我们可使用的模型大小。我们将在实验中进一步探讨模型大小对推理速度的影响。我们采用两种技术来加速推理：（i）通过使用TokenLearner（Ryoo等人，2021）减少预训练EfficientNet模型生成的令牌数量；（ii）仅计算这些令牌一次，并在后续重叠的窗口中重复使用。这两种技术分别使模型推理速度提高了2.4倍和1.7倍。关于模型推理的更多细节见附录C.1。

items.en: Our goal is to build a system that exhibits high performance, generalization to new tasks, and robustness to distractors and backgrounds. We therefore aim to collect a large, diverse dataset of robot trajectories that includes multiple tasks, objects and environments. Our primary dataset consists of ∼similar-to\sim130k robot demonstrations, collected with a fleet of 13 robots over the course of 17 months. We conducted this large-scale data collection in a series of office kitchen segments, which we refer to as robot classrooms, shown in Fig. 2. More details on data collection are in Appendix C.2.
items.zh: 我们的目标是构建一个具有高性能、对新任务泛化能力强、以及对干扰物和背景具有鲁棒性的系统。因此，我们旨在收集一个包含多个任务、物体和环境的多样化大规模机器人轨迹数据集。我们的主要数据集包含约13万个机器人演示，由13台机器人组成的团队在17个月内收集完成。我们在一系列办公室厨房区域（称为机器人教室，如图2所示）中进行了大规模数据收集。关于数据收集的更多细节见附录C.2。

items.en: Skills and instructions. While the definition of a task remains inconsistent in the literature, in this work we count the number of language instructions that the system can perform, where an instruction corresponds to a verb surrounded by one or multiple nouns, such as “place water bottle upright”, “move the coke can to the green chip bag” or “open the drawer”. RT-1 is able to perform over 700 language instructions in multiple realistic office kitchen environments that we evaluate and describe in detail in the experiments. In order to group the evaluations and draw conclusions on the performance of the system, we group the instructions by the verbs used in them, which we refer to as skills. A more detailed list of instructions is shown in Table 1, with examples and the number of instructions per skill.
items.zh: 技能和指令。尽管文献中任务的定义不一致，但在这项工作中，我们统计系统能够执行的语言指令数量，其中指令对应于一个动词后跟一个或多个名词，例如“将水瓶直立放置”、“将可乐罐移到绿色薯片袋”或“打开抽屉”。RT-1能够在多个真实的办公室厨房环境中执行超过700条语言指令，我们在实验中进行了详细评估和描述。为了分组评估并得出系统性能的结论，我们根据指令中使用的动词进行分组，称为技能。表1显示了更详细的指令列表，包括示例和每个技能的指令数量。

items.en: The current set of skills includes picking, placing, opening and closing drawers, getting items in and out drawers, placing elongated items up-right, knocking them over, pulling napkins and opening jars. The skills were chosen to demonstrate multiple behaviors with many objects (seen in Fig. 2(e)) to test aspects of RT-1 such as generalization to new instructions and ability to perform many tasks. We then greatly expanded the object diversity for the “pick” skill to make sure that the skills generalize to varied objects (see the expanded set of objects in Fig. 2(f)). The skills were further expanded while we conducted the ablations to include instructions added in the last row of Table 1, which were used for the experiments described in Sec. 6.4 and 6.3. These additional skills focused on realistic, long-horizon instructions in an office kitchen. The entire process of adding tasks and data is described in the Appendix C.4. Since we do not make any assumptions about particular skills when adding new instructions, the system is easily extendable, and we can continuously provide more diverse data to improve its capabilities.
items.zh: 当前的技能集包括拾取、放置、打开和关闭抽屉、将物品放入和取出抽屉、将长形物品直立放置、将其推倒、拉出纸巾和打开罐子。选择这些技能是为了展示涉及多个物体的多种行为（如图2(e)所示），以测试RT-1的泛化能力（如对新指令的泛化）和执行多任务的能力。然后，我们大幅扩展了“拾取”技能的物体多样性，以确保技能能够泛化到各种物体（扩展后的物体集见图2(f)）。在进行消融实验时，我们进一步扩展了技能，包括表1最后一行添加的指令，这些指令用于第6.4节和第6.3节描述的实验。这些额外的技能侧重于办公室厨房中的现实长时域指令。添加任务和数据的整个过程见附录C.4。由于我们在添加新指令时没有对特定技能做出任何假设，因此系统易于扩展，我们可以持续提供更多样化的数据以提高其能力。

items.en: Our experiments seek to answer the following questions:
items.zh: 我们的实验旨在回答以下问题：

items.en: Can an RT-1 learn to perform a large number of instructions, as well as to generalize in zero shot to new tasks, objects and environments? (Section 6.2)
items.zh: RT-1能否学习执行大量指令，并零样本泛化到新任务、物体和环境？（第6.2节）

items.en: Can we push the resulting model even further by incorporating heterogeneous data sources, such as simulated data or data from different robots? (Section 6.3)
items.zh: 我们能否通过整合异构数据源（如模拟数据或来自不同机器人的数据）进一步推动模型性能？（第6.3节）

items.en: How do various methods generalize to long-horizon robotic scenarios? (Section 6.4)
items.zh: 各种方法在长时域机器人场景中的泛化能力如何？（第6.4节）

items.en: How do generalization metrics change with varying amounts of data quantity and data diversity? (Section 6.5)
items.zh: 泛化指标如何随数据量和数据多样性的变化而变化？（第6.5节）

items.en: What are the important and practical decisions in the design of the model and how do they affect performance and generalization? (Appendix Section D.4)
items.zh: 模型设计中的重要且实际决策是什么？它们如何影响性能和泛化？（附录D.4节）

items.en: Throughout this section we will compare to two baseline state of the art architectures, Gato (Reed et al., 2022) and BC-Z (Jang et al., 2021). Importantly both of these are trained on our data described in detail in Sec. 5.2 (which is an important part of our system) since the original models in these publications would not exhibit generalization properties required for our evaluation tasks. Gato is, similarly to RT-1, based on a Transformer architecture, but varies from RT-1 in multiple aspects. First, it computes image tokens without the notion of language and each image token embedding is computed separately for each image patch, as opposed to early language fusion and global image embedding in our model. Second, it does not use a pre-trained text embedding to encode the language string. It also does not include inference time considerations that are necessary for real robots as discussed in Sec. 5.1 such as TokenLearner and the removal of auto-regressive actions. In order to run Gato on real robots at a high enough frequency, we also limit the size of the model compared to the original publication, which was 1.2B parameters (resulting in on robot inference time of 1.91.91.9s), to be of similar size to RT-1 (37M parameters for Gato vs. 35M for RT-1). BC-Z is based on a ResNet architecture, and was used in SayCan (Ahn et al., 2022). BC-Z differs from RT-1 in that it is a feedforward model that does not use previous timesteps, and it uses continuous actions rather than discrete action tokens. In addition to the original BC-Z model size, we also compare our method to a larger version of BC-Z that has a similar number of parameters to RT-1 and refer to it as BC-Z XL. We study and analyze how each of these design decisions changes performance in Appendix Sections D.4 and D.5.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们将与两种基线最先进架构 Gato（Reed 等人，2022）和 BC-Z（Jang 等人，2021）进行比较。重要的是，这两者都在我们的数据上进行了训练（详见第 5.2 节，这是我们系统的重要组成部分），因为这些出版物中的原始模型不具备我们评估任务所需的泛化特性。Gato 与 RT-1 类似，基于 Transformer 架构，但在多个方面与 RT-1 不同。首先，它在没有语言概念的情况下计算图像令牌，每个图像块嵌入是单独计算的，而我们的模型则采用早期语言融合和全局图像嵌入。其次，它不使用预训练的文本嵌入来编码语言字符串。此外，它不包括第 5.1 节中讨论的真实机器人所需的推理时间考虑因素，例如 TokenLearner 和去除自回归动作。为了在真实机器人上以足够高的频率运行 Gato，我们还限制了模型的大小（原始模型为 1.2B 参数，导致机器人推理时间为 1.9 秒），使其与 RT-1 的大小相近（Gato 为 37M 参数，RT-1 为 35M 参数）。BC-Z 基于 ResNet 架构，并用于 SayCan（Ahn 等人，2022）。BC-Z 与 RT-1 的不同之处在于它是一个前馈模型，不使用先前的时间步，并且使用连续动作而非离散动作令牌。除了原始 BC-Z 模型大小外，我们还将我们的方法与一个参数数量与 RT-1 相近的更大版本 BC-Z 进行比较，并将其称为 BC-Z XL。我们在附录 D.4 和 D.5 节中研究并分析了这些设计决策如何改变性能。

items.en: We evaluate the success rate in experiments to measure performance on training instructions, generalization to unseen instructions, robustness to backgrounds and distractors, and performance in long-horizon scenarios, as detailed below. Throughout this section, we evaluate our approach and baselines with over 3000 real-world trials, making one of the largest scale evaluation of a robot learning system to-date.
items.zh: 我们通过实验评估成功率，以衡量训练指令的性能、对未见指令的泛化能力、对背景和干扰物的鲁棒性以及在长时域场景中的表现，详见下文。在本节中，我们通过超过 3000 次真实世界试验评估我们的方法和基线，这是迄今为止最大规模的机器人学习系统评估之一。

items.en: As mentioned in Section 4, we evaluate RT-1 with a set of mobile manipulators from Everyday Robots in three environments: two real office kitchens and a training environment modelled off these real kitchens. The training environment, shown in Fig. 2 (a), consists of partial counters while the two real environments, shown in Fig. 2 (b, c), have similar counter tops to the training environment, but vary in lighting, background, and full kitchen geometry (e.g., there may be a cabinet instead of a drawer or a sink may be visible). The policies are evaluated for performance on training tasks as well as generalization to new tasks, robustness to unseen environments, and performance when chained together for long-horizon tasks, as detailed below.
items.zh: 如第 4 节所述，我们在三个环境中使用 Everyday Robots 的一组移动操作器评估 RT-1：两个真实的办公厨房和一个模拟这些真实厨房的训练环境。训练环境如图 2(a) 所示，包含部分柜台，而两个真实环境如图 2(b, c) 所示，具有与训练环境相似的台面，但在照明、背景和完整厨房几何形状（例如，可能有橱柜而不是抽屉，或可见水槽）方面有所不同。策略在训练任务上的性能以及对新任务的泛化能力、对未见环境的鲁棒性以及在长时域任务中串联时的表现进行评估，详见下文。

items.en: Seen task performance. To evaluate performance on seen instructions, we evaluate performance on instructions sampled from the training set. Note, however, that this evaluation still involves varying the placement of objects and other factors of the setup (e.g., time of day, robot position), requiring the skills to generalize to realistic variability in the environment. In all, we test over 200 tasks in this evaluation: 36 for picking objects, 35 for knocking objects, 35 for placing things upright, 48 for moving objects, 18 for opening and closing various drawers, and 36 for picking out of and placing objects into drawers.
items.zh: 已见任务性能。为了评估已见指令的性能，我们评估从训练集中采样的指令的性能。但请注意，此评估仍然涉及物体放置位置和其他设置因素（例如，一天中的时间、机器人位置）的变化，要求技能泛化到环境中的实际变异性。总体而言，我们在本次评估中测试了超过 200 个任务：36 个拾取物体、35 个敲击物体、35 个将物体直立放置、48 个移动物体、18 个打开和关闭各种抽屉，以及 36 个从抽屉中取出和放入物体。

items.en: Unseen tasks generalization. To evaluate generalization to unseen tasks, we test 21 novel, unseen instructions. These instructions are distributed across skills and objects. This ensures that at least some instances of each object and skill were present in the training set but they will be combined in novel ways. For example, if “pick up the apple” is held out, then there are other training instructions that include the apple. The list of all unseen instructions can be found in the Appendix D.1.
items.zh: 未见任务泛化。为了评估对未见任务的泛化能力，我们测试了 21 个新颖的、未见过的指令。这些指令分布在不同的技能和物体之间。这确保了训练集中至少存在每个物体和技能的某些实例，但它们将以新颖的方式组合。例如，如果“拿起苹果”被保留，那么训练集中还有其他包含苹果的指令。所有未见指令的列表可在附录 D.1 中找到。

items.en: Robustness. To evaluate robustness, we perform 30 real-world tasks for distractor robustness and 22 tasks for background robustness. The background robustness was tested by evaluating in new kitchens (which have different lighting and background visuals) and with different counter surfaces (e.g., a patterned table cloth). Example configurations of the robustness evaluation scenarios are depicted in Fig. 4.
items.zh: 鲁棒性。为了评估鲁棒性，我们执行了 30 个真实世界任务用于干扰物鲁棒性，以及 22 个任务用于背景鲁棒性。背景鲁棒性通过在新厨房（具有不同的照明和背景视觉）以及不同的台面（例如，带图案的桌布）中进行评估。鲁棒性评估场景的示例配置如图 4 所示。

items.en: Long-horizon scenarios. We also evaluate generalization to more realistic long-horizon scenarios, which each require executing a sequence of skills. The goal of this evaluation is to combine multiple generalization axes such as new tasks, objects, environments and test the overall generalization capabilities in realistic settings. These evaluations consist of 15 long-horizon instructions in two real kitchens, which require executing sequences of skills consisting of ∼10similar-toabsent10\sim 10 distinct steps, with each step of roughly comparable scope as the training instructions. These steps are obtained automatically from higher level instructions, such as “how would you throw away all the items on the table?” by using the SayCan system (Ahn et al., 2022), as described in detail in Section 6.4 and Appendix D.3.
items.zh: 长时域场景。我们还评估了对更真实的长时域场景的泛化能力，每个场景都需要执行一系列技能。此评估的目标是结合多个泛化轴，例如新任务、物体、环境，并在真实环境中测试整体泛化能力。这些评估包括在两个真实厨房中的 15 个长时域指令，需要执行由约 10 个不同步骤组成的技能序列，每个步骤的范围与训练指令大致相当。这些步骤通过使用 SayCan 系统（Ahn 等人，2022）从更高级别的指令（例如“如何扔掉桌子上所有物品？”）自动获得，详见第 6.4 节和附录 D.3。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Evaluation scenarios for distractors (first row), from left to right: easy (0-5 distractors), medium (9 distractors), hard (9 distractors and occluded object); background (second row), from left to right: original environment, patterned table cloth, new kitchen; and realistic scenarios in the real kitchen (third row), generalization levels from left to right: L​1𝐿1L1, L​2𝐿2L2 and L​3𝐿3L3.
items.capZh: 图 4：干扰物评估场景（第一行），从左到右：简单（0-5 个干扰物）、中等（9 个干扰物）、困难（9 个干扰物和遮挡物体）；背景（第二行），从左到右：原始环境、带图案的桌布、新厨房；以及真实厨房中的现实场景（第三行），泛化级别从左到右：L1、L2 和 L3。

full.sec: 6.2 Can RT-1 learn to perform a large number of instructions, and to generalize to new tasks, objects and environments?
full.secZh: 6.2 RT-1能否学习执行大量指令，并泛化到新任务、物体和环境？

items.en: To answer our first question, we analyze the overall performance, generalization, and robustness capabilities of RT-1 compared to previously proposed models. Specifically, we compare to the model architectures used by Gato (Reed et al., 2022) and BC-Z (Jang et al., 2021), as well as a larger version of BC-Z, which we refer to as BC-Z XL. Note, however, that all models are trained on the same data as RT-1, and the evaluation only compares the model architectures, not the task sets, datasets, or overall robotic systems. The capabilities of RT-1 are determined to a large extent by the dataset and task set, which we believe improves significantly over prior works (e.g. BC-Z uses 100 tasks and the original Gato model trains a stacking task with various shapes), and thus this comparison should be viewed as rather favorable to the prior models, which also benefit from the large and diverse dataset and task set that we collected.
items.zh: 为了回答我们的第一个问题，我们分析了 RT-1 与先前提出的模型相比的整体性能、泛化能力和鲁棒性。具体来说，我们与 Gato（Reed 等人，2022）和 BC-Z（Jang 等人，2021）使用的模型架构以及更大版本的 BC-Z（我们称之为 BC-Z XL）进行比较。但请注意，所有模型都在与 RT-1 相同的数据上进行训练，评估仅比较模型架构，而不比较任务集、数据集或整体机器人系统。RT-1 的能力在很大程度上取决于数据集和任务集，我们认为这比先前的工作有显著改进（例如，BC-Z 使用 100 个任务，原始 Gato 模型训练了一个包含各种形状的堆叠任务），因此这种比较应被视为对先前模型相当有利，因为它们也受益于我们收集的大规模和多样化的数据集和任务集。

items.en: The results are shown in Table 2. Across each category, we find that RT-1 outperforms the prior models significantly. On seen tasks, RT-1 is able to perform 97% of the more than 200 instructions successfully, which is 25% more than BC-Z and 32% more than Gato. On unseen tasks, RT-1 shows it is capable of generalizing to novel instructions, performing 76% of the never-before-seen instructions, 24% more than the next best baseline. While such generalization to novel instructions is made possible due to natural language conditioning of the policy, as the policy is able to understand new combinations of previously seen concepts, all of the baselines are also conditioned on natural language and in principle enjoy the same benefits. We further ablate different components of RT-1 in the next section to better understand what aspects of our method contribute the most to this difference. On distractors and backgrounds, we find that RT-1 is quite robust, successfully executing 83% of the distractor robustness tasks and 59% of the background robustness tasks (36% and 18% higher than the next best alternative, respectively). Overall, we find that RT-1 has high general performance, while exhibiting impressive degrees of generalization and robustness. We show example trajectories of the RT-1 agent including instructions that cover different skills, environments and objects in Fig. 5. We also present additional trajectory examples for different generalization tests in the Appendix, which include backgrounds (Fig. 10), and distractors (Fig. 12).
items.zh: 结果如表 2 所示。在每个类别中，我们发现 RT-1 显著优于先前模型。在已见任务上，RT-1 能够成功执行超过 200 个指令中的 97%，比 BC-Z 高 25%，比 Gato 高 32%。在未见任务上，RT-1 展示了泛化到新颖指令的能力，执行了 76% 的从未见过的指令，比次优基线高 24%。虽然这种对新颖指令的泛化能力得益于策略的自然语言条件，因为策略能够理解先前见过概念的新组合，但所有基线也都以自然语言为条件，并享有同样的优势。我们在下一节进一步消融 RT-1 的不同组件，以更好地理解我们方法的哪些方面对差异贡献最大。在干扰物和背景方面，我们发现 RT-1 相当鲁棒，成功执行了 83% 的干扰物鲁棒性任务和 59% 的背景鲁棒性任务（分别比次优替代方案高 36% 和 18%）。总体而言，我们发现 RT-1 具有较高的整体性能，同时展现出令人印象深刻的泛化能力和鲁棒性。我们在图 5 中展示了 RT-1 智能体的示例轨迹，包括涵盖不同技能、环境和物体的指令。我们还在附录中提供了不同泛化测试的额外轨迹示例，包括背景（图 10）和干扰物（图 12）。

items.capEn: Table 2: Overall performance of RT-1 and baselines across seen tasks, generalization to unseen tasks, and robustness to distractors and backgrounds.
items.capZh: 表 2：RT-1 和基线在已见任务、未见任务泛化以及干扰物和背景鲁棒性方面的整体性能。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Example evaluation trajectories for RT-1 across various instructions.
items.capZh: 图 5：RT-1 在各种指令下的评估轨迹示例。

items.en: Generalization to realistic instructions. Next, we test whether our method generalizes enough across all the different axes that we evaluated previously to be deployed in a real kitchen, which poses multiple distribution shifts all at once such as new tasks combinations, object distractors as well as a novel environment.
items.zh: 泛化到现实指令。接下来，我们测试我们的方法是否在之前评估的所有不同轴上充分泛化，以便部署在真实厨房中，这同时带来了多种分布偏移，例如新任务组合、物体干扰物以及新环境。

items.en: To evaluate our algorithm in realistic scenarios in a real kitchen, we construct task sequences to accomplish a number of realistic goals. The robot restocks several snacks in drawers, tidies up knocked over condiment bottles and closes drawers left open by humans, prepares a snack with an orange and a napkin and fetches lost sunglasses and an octopus toy from several places in the kitchen. The detailed instructions used in these scenarios are listed in the Appendix D.1. The office kitchen involves a dramatic shift from the training environment and we categorize tasks across these scenarios with varying levels of generalization: L​1𝐿1L1 for generalization to the new counter-top layout and lighting conditions, L​2𝐿2L2 for additionally generalization to unseen distractor objects, L​3𝐿3L3 for additional generalization to drastically new task settings, new task objects or objects in unseen locations such as near a sink. The three levels that correspond to the three tasks of restocking, preparing a snack and fetching a lost object in the real kitchen are depicted in the last row of Fig. 4. Example trajectories for different levels are presented in the Appendix in Fig. 11.
items.zh: 为了在真实厨房的现实场景中评估我们的算法，我们构建了任务序列以实现多个现实目标。机器人将几种零食重新放入抽屉，整理被撞倒的调味品瓶，关闭人类留下的抽屉，用橙子和餐巾准备零食，并从厨房的多个地方取回丢失的太阳镜和章鱼玩具。这些场景中使用的详细指令列在附录 D.1 中。办公厨房与训练环境存在显著差异，我们将这些场景中的任务按泛化级别分类：L1 为泛化到新的台面布局和照明条件，L2 为额外泛化到未见过的干扰物物体，L3 为额外泛化到全新的任务设置、新任务物体或位于未见位置（如水槽附近）的物体。对应于真实厨房中补货、准备零食和取回丢失物体这三个任务的三个级别如图 4 最后一行所示。不同级别的示例轨迹见附录图 11。

items.en: We report the per-task success rate in these realistic scenarios along with the varying generalization levels in Table 3 and find RT-1 to be the most robust on all levels. Gato generalizes fairly well at the first level but it performs significantly drops for the more difficult generalization scenarios. BC-Z and its XL equivalent perform fairly well at L​2𝐿2L2 level and better than Gato at L​3𝐿3L3 but they are still not at the generalization level of RT-1.
items.zh: 我们在表 3 中报告了这些现实场景中不同泛化级别的每任务成功率，发现 RT-1 在所有级别上最为鲁棒。Gato 在第一个级别上泛化得相当好，但在更困难的泛化场景中性能显著下降。BC-Z 及其 XL 版本在 L2 级别上表现相当好，在 L3 级别上优于 Gato，但仍未达到 RT-1 的泛化水平。

full.sec: 6.3 Can we push the resulting model further by incorporating heterogeneous data sources such as simulation or data from different robots?
full.secZh: 6.3 通过整合异构数据源（如仿真或不同机器人的数据），能否进一步推动模型性能？

items.en: Next, we explore the limits of RT-1 for utilizing highly heterogeneous data. We demonstrate how RT-1 can incorporate and learn from vastly different data sources and improve from such data without sacrificing its original-tasks performance across the varied tasks inherent in this data. To this end, we conduct two experiments: (1) RT-1 trained and tested on both real data and simulation data and (2) RT-1 trained across large datasets of different tasks, originally collected by different robots. More information on each is provided in Appendix D.2.
items.zh: 接下来，我们探索 RT-1 在利用高度异构数据方面的极限。我们展示了 RT-1 如何整合和学习来自截然不同数据源的数据，并在不牺牲其原始任务性能的情况下从这些数据中改进。为此，我们进行了两个实验：（1）RT-1 在真实数据和模拟数据上训练和测试；（2）RT-1 在最初由不同机器人收集的不同任务的大规模数据集上训练。每个实验的更多信息见附录 D.2。

items.en: Absorbing simulation data. Table 4 shows the ability of RT-1, and baselines, to absorb both real and simulation data. To test this, we take all of the real demonstration data but we also provide additional simulation data that includes objects that the robot has never seen in the real world. Specifically, we specify different generalization scenarios: for seen skills with real objects the training data has real data of that instruction (i.e., performance on seen tasks), for seen skills with sim objects the training data has sim data of that instruction (e.g. “pick up a sim object”, which was present in sim), and for unseen skills with sim objects the training data has sim data of that object but there are no examples of the instruction describing the skill with that object either in sim or in real (e.g., “move a sim object to apple”, even though the robot has only practiced in picking that sim object and not moving it near other objects). All evaluations are done in the real world but to limit the number of instructions evaluated, we focus on pick and move-to skills.
items.zh: 吸收模拟数据。表 4 显示了 RT-1 和基线吸收真实和模拟数据的能力。为了测试这一点，我们使用了所有真实演示数据，但也提供了额外的模拟数据，其中包括机器人在真实世界中从未见过的物体。具体来说，我们指定了不同的泛化场景：对于具有真实物体的已见技能，训练数据包含该指令的真实数据（即已见任务性能）；对于具有模拟物体的已见技能，训练数据包含该指令的模拟数据（例如，“拿起一个模拟物体”，这在模拟中存在）；对于具有模拟物体的未见技能，训练数据包含该物体的模拟数据，但没有指令描述该技能与该物体组合的示例，无论是在模拟还是真实中（例如，“将模拟物体移动到苹果”，即使机器人只练习过拿起该模拟物体，而没有将其移动到其他物体附近）。所有评估都在真实世界中进行，但为了限制评估的指令数量，我们专注于拾取和移动到技能。

items.en: We find in Table 4 that for RT-1, we do not lose performance adding simulation data compared to the Real Only dataset. We do however, see a significant increase in performance (from 23% to 87%) on objects and tasks seen only in simulation, to approximately the performance of the those in real, demonstrating an impressive degree of domain transfer. We also see a significant increase in performance on unseen instructions from 7% to 33%; impressive given the object in question has never been seen in real and the instruction never seen at all. Overall, we find that RT-1 is able to efficiently absorb new data, even from a very different domain.
items.zh: 我们在表 4 中发现，对于 RT-1，添加模拟数据不会导致性能损失，与仅真实数据集相比。然而，我们确实看到在仅模拟中见过的物体和任务上性能显著提升（从 23% 到 87%），接近真实物体的性能，展示了令人印象深刻的领域迁移程度。我们还看到在未见指令上性能显著提升，从 7% 到 33%；考虑到该物体从未在真实中出现过，且指令从未见过，这令人印象深刻。总体而言，我们发现 RT-1 能够有效吸收新数据，即使来自非常不同的领域。

items.capEn: Table 4: Experimental results for incorporating simulation data in RT-1. Adding simulation data does not impact the performance on real objects, while significantly improving real performance on objects that were only introduced in simulation (+64%). It also improves real-world generalization on simulated objects used with skills seen only in the real world (+26%), e.g. “move X to Y” where X only appeared in simulated “pick X” task.
items.capZh: 表 4：在 RT-1 中整合模拟数据的实验结果。添加模拟数据不会影响真实物体的性能，同时显著提高了仅在模拟中引入的物体在真实中的性能（+64%）。它还提高了在真实世界中仅见过的技能与模拟物体组合的泛化能力（+26%），例如“将 X 移动到 Y”，其中 X 仅出现在模拟的“拿起 X”任务中。

items.en: Absorbing data from different robots. To push the data absorption limits of RT-1, we conduct an additional set of experiments where we combine two data sources that originate from different robots: Kuka IIWA as well as the Everyday Robots mobile manipulators used in the experiments so far. The Kuka data contains all the successful examples collected in QT-Opt (Kalashnikov et al., 2018), which corresponds to 209k episodes, where the robot was indiscriminately grasping objects in a bin (see an example of a Kuka episode in Table. 5). To test whether RT-1 can effectively absorb these two very different datasets, which we refer to as the standard “Classroom eval”, as well as the performance on the newly constructed tasks that reflect the bin-picking setup present in the Kuka data, which we refer to as the “Bin-picking eval” (see Fig. 6).
items.zh: 吸收来自不同机器人的数据。为了推动 RT-1 的数据吸收极限，我们进行了另一组实验，其中结合了来自不同机器人的两个数据源：Kuka IIWA 以及迄今为止实验中使用的 Everyday Robots 移动操作器。Kuka 数据包含 QT-Opt（Kalashnikov 等人，2018）中收集的所有成功示例，对应于 209k 个片段，其中机器人无差别地抓取箱子中的物体（参见表 5 中的 Kuka 片段示例）。为了测试 RT-1 能否有效吸收这两个非常不同的数据集，我们评估了标准“教室评估”以及反映 Kuka 数据中存在的箱子拾取设置的新构建任务，我们称之为“箱子拾取评估”（见图 6）。

items.capEn: Figure 6: In Table 5, RT-1 is trained with data from two robotics platforms and learns to generalize across them.
items.capZh: 图6：在表5中，RT-1使用来自两个机器人平台的数据进行训练，并学会了跨平台泛化。

items.en: We would like to emphasize the difficulty of this setting by noting the major differences between the datasets. Not only are the robots that collected the data different in appearance and action space, but also the environment they were deployed in has different appearance and dynamics. In addition the QT-Opt data presents a completely different action distribution – it was collected by an RL agent as opposed to human demonstrations present in our dataset.
items.zh: 我们想通过指出数据集之间的主要差异来强调这一设置的难度。不仅收集数据的机器人在外观和动作空间上不同，而且它们部署的环境也具有不同的外观和动态。此外，QT-Opt数据呈现出完全不同的动作分布——它是由强化学习智能体收集的，而不是我们数据集中的人类演示。

items.en: The results are presented in Table 5. We observe that the model that mixes the RT-1 data and the Kuka data has only a minimal decrease in the original tasks’ performance (i.e. Classroom eval), i.e. 2%percent22\%. Even more importantly, in the Bin-picking eval, we observe that the model trained on multi-robot data performs at 39%percent3939\% compared to the 22%percent2222\% of the model that was trained only on the RT-1 data. This is a 17%percent1717\% performance difference (almost 2x). Additionally, RT-1 trained on Kuka bin-picking data and evaluated on the bin-picking tasks with the Everyday Robots (EDR) robot achieves 0% performance, confirming that it is difficult to transfer a behavior from another robot morphology. However, mixing the data from both robots allows RT-1 to infer the correct actions of the EDR robot even when faced with the states observed by Kuka robots. This is achieved without explicit demonstrations of bin-picking on EDR robot and by taking advantage of past experiences collected by Kuka robots. These results indicate that RT-1’s absorption properties also include the ability to acquire new skills through observing other robots’ experiences and present an exciting avenue of future work where we combine many more multi-robot datasets to enhance the robot capabilities.
items.zh: 结果如表5所示。我们观察到，混合RT-1数据和Kuka数据的模型在原始任务性能（即教室评估）上仅有微小下降，即2%。更重要的是，在拣选评估中，我们观察到使用多机器人数据训练的模型性能为39%，而仅使用RT-1数据训练的模型性能为22%。这是17%的性能差异（几乎翻倍）。此外，仅使用Kuka拣选数据训练的RT-1在Everyday Robots（EDR）机器人的拣选任务上评估时性能为0%，这证实了从另一种机器人形态迁移行为是困难的。然而，混合两个机器人的数据使RT-1即使在面对Kuka机器人观察到的状态时也能推断出EDR机器人的正确动作。这是在没有EDR机器人拣选明确演示的情况下，通过利用Kuka机器人收集的过往经验实现的。这些结果表明，RT-1的吸收特性还包括通过观察其他机器人的经验来获取新技能的能力，并为未来工作提供了一个令人兴奋的方向，即结合更多多机器人数据集来增强机器人能力。

full.sec: 6.4 How do various methods generalize long-horizon robotic scenarios?
full.secZh: 6.4 各种方法在长时域机器人场景中的泛化表现如何？

items.en: In the next set of experiments we evaluate whether our method generalizes enough to be used in long-horizon realistic kitchen settings. To answer this question, we execute RT-1 and various baselines within the SayCan (Ahn et al., 2022) framework in two different real kitchens. Since SayCan combines many low-level instructions to perform high-level instructions, the number of possible high-level instructions increases combinatorially with skills, so the skill-breadth of RT-1 can be fully seen (for more details on the SayCan algorithm please refer to Ahn et al. (2022)). The success rate of long-horizon tasks also decreases exponentially with the length of the task, so high success rates in manipulation skills are particularly important. Furthermore, as mobile manipulation tasks require both navigation and manipulation, the policies ability to be robust to base position is crucial. More detail is provided in Appendix D.3.
items.zh: 在下一组实验中，我们评估我们的方法是否足够泛化以用于长时域的真实厨房场景。为了回答这个问题，我们在两个不同的真实厨房中，在SayCan（Ahn等人，2022）框架内执行RT-1和各种基线。由于SayCan结合了许多低级指令来执行高级指令，高级指令的可能数量随技能组合呈指数增长，因此RT-1的技能广度得以充分展现（关于SayCan算法的更多细节，请参考Ahn等人（2022））。长时域任务的成功率也随任务长度呈指数下降，因此操作技能的高成功率尤为重要。此外，由于移动操作任务需要导航和操作，策略对基座位置的鲁棒性至关重要。更多细节见附录D.3。

full.sec: 6.5 How do generalization metrics change with varying amounts of data quantity and data diversity?
full.secZh: 6.5 泛化指标如何随数据量和数据多样性的变化而变化？

items.en: While previous works have shown the scaling abilities of Transformer-based models (Lee et al., 2022a; Reed et al., 2022; Jiang et al., 2022) with the number of model parameters, in many robotics works the model size is often not the primary bottleneck, and the maximum size is limited by the latency requirement for running such models on real robots. Instead, in this study we focus on ablating the influence of dataset size and diversity, as they play an important role in the traditionally data-limited robot learning field. Since data collection is particularly expensive for real robots, it is important to quantify what kind of data our models need to achieve a certain performance and generalization. Thus, our last question focuses on the scaling properties of RT-1 with different data properties.
items.zh: 虽然先前的工作已经展示了基于Transformer的模型（Lee等人，2022a；Reed等人，2022；Jiang等人，2022）随模型参数数量的缩放能力，但在许多机器人学工作中，模型大小通常不是主要瓶颈，最大尺寸受限于在真实机器人上运行此类模型的延迟要求。相反，在本研究中，我们专注于消融数据集大小和多样性的影响，因为它们在传统数据受限的机器人学习领域中扮演重要角色。由于真实机器人的数据收集特别昂贵，量化我们的模型需要什么样的数据才能达到一定的性能和泛化能力非常重要。因此，我们的最后一个问题聚焦于RT-1在不同数据属性下的缩放特性。

items.capEn: Table 7: Various data ablations of RT-1 across seen tasks, generalization to unseen tasks, and robustness to distractors and backgrounds. Data diversity has a higher impact on the performance and generalization than data quantity.
items.capZh: 表7：RT-1在已见任务、未见任务泛化以及对抗干扰物和背景的鲁棒性方面的各种数据消融。数据多样性对性能和泛化的影响比数据量更大。

items.en: In Table 7 we show the performance, generalization, and robustness of RT-1 as we decrease the dataset size (% data) and the dataset diversity (% tasks). To separate the axes of dataset size and diversity, we create smaller datasets with the same task diversity by removing data from the tasks with the largest data, capping the number of examples per task at 200 (resulting in 51% of the data), 100 (37% of the data), and 50 (22.5% of the data). To create a narrow dataset, we remove the tasks with the least data, thus keeping 97% of the overall data but only 75% of the tasks. As we decrease dataset size, we see a general trend of decreasing performance and a steeper trend of decreasing generalization. As we make the dataset more narrow, we see much steeper performance reductions, particularly in terms of generalization. In fact, removing 25% of the tasks while keeping 97% of the data achieves an equivalent generalization performance to reducing the dataset size by as much as 49%. Our key takeaway is thus that data diversity is more essential than data quantity.
items.zh: 在表7中，我们展示了随着数据集大小（%数据）和数据集多样性（%任务）的减少，RT-1的性能、泛化和鲁棒性。为了分离数据集大小和多样性这两个维度，我们通过从数据最多的任务中移除数据，将每个任务的示例数量上限设为200（得到51%的数据）、100（37%的数据）和50（22.5%的数据），从而创建了具有相同任务多样性的较小数据集。为了创建狭窄的数据集，我们移除了数据最少的任务，从而保留了97%的总数据但仅75%的任务。随着数据集大小的减小，我们观察到性能普遍下降，泛化能力下降更陡峭。随着数据集变得更狭窄，我们观察到性能下降更剧烈，特别是在泛化方面。事实上，移除25%的任务同时保留97%的数据，其泛化性能相当于将数据集大小减少多达49%。因此，我们的关键结论是数据多样性比数据量更重要。

full.secZh: 7 结论、局限性与未来工作

items.en: We presented Robotics Transformer 1, RT-1, a robot learning method that can effectively absorb large amounts of data and scales with data quantity and diversity. We trained RT-1 on a large dataset of demonstrations containing over 130k episodes collected over the course of 17 months with 13 robots. In our broad set of experiments, we demonstrated that our method that can perform over 700 instructions at 97% success rate and effectively generalize to new tasks, objects and environments better than previously published baselines. We also demonstrated that RT-1 can successfully absorb heterogeneous data from simulation and other robot morphologies without sacrificing original-tasks performance and while improving generalization to new scenarios. Lastly, we showed how this level of performance and generalization allowed us to execute very long-horizon tasks in the SayCan (Ahn et al., 2022) framework, with as many as 50 steps.
items.zh: 我们提出了机器人Transformer 1（RT-1），一种能够有效吸收大量数据并随数据量和多样性扩展的机器人学习方法。我们在一个包含超过13万个演示片段的大型数据集上训练了RT-1，该数据集由13个机器人在17个月内收集。在我们广泛的实验中，我们证明了我们的方法能够以97%的成功率执行超过700条指令，并且比先前发表的基线更好地泛化到新任务、物体和环境。我们还证明了RT-1能够成功吸收来自仿真和其他机器人形态的异构数据，而不会牺牲原始任务性能，同时提高对新场景的泛化能力。最后，我们展示了这种性能和泛化水平使我们能够在SayCan（Ahn等人，2022）框架中执行长达50步的极长时域任务。

items.en: While RT-1 presents a promising step towards large-scale robot learning with an data-absorbent model, it comes with a number of limitations. First, it is an imitation learning method, which inherits the challenges of that class of approaches such as the fact that it may not be able to surpass the performance of the demonstrators. Second, the generalization to new instructions is limited to the combinations of previously seen concepts and RT-1 is not yet able to generalize to a completely new motion that has not been seen before. Lastly, our method is presented on a large but not very dexterous set of manipulation tasks. We plan to continue extending the set of instructions that RT-1 enables and generalizes to to address this challenge.
items.zh: 虽然RT-1朝着大规模机器人学习迈出了有希望的一步，但它也存在一些局限性。首先，它是一种模仿学习方法，继承了该类方法的挑战，例如可能无法超越演示者的性能。其次，对新指令的泛化仅限于先前见过概念的组合，RT-1尚不能泛化到从未见过的全新动作。最后，我们的方法是在一个大型但不够灵巧的操作任务集上呈现的。我们计划继续扩展RT-1能够实现和泛化的指令集，以应对这一挑战。

items.en: As we explore future directions for this work, we hope to scale the number of robot skills faster by developing methods that allow non-experts to train the robot via directed data collection and model prompting. While the current version of RT-1 is fairly robust especially to distractor objects, its robustness to backgrounds and environments could be further improved by greatly increasing the environment diversity. We also hope to improve the reaction speeds and context retention of RT-1 through scalable attention and memory.
items.zh: 在探索未来方向时，我们希望通过开发允许非专家通过定向数据收集和模型提示来训练机器人的方法，更快地扩展机器人技能的数量。虽然当前版本的RT-1相当鲁棒，特别是对抗干扰物，但其对背景和环境的鲁棒性可以通过大幅增加环境多样性来进一步提高。我们还希望通过可扩展的注意力机制和记忆来提高RT-1的反应速度和上下文保持能力。

items.en: To allow the research community to build on top of this work, we have open-sourced the code for RT-1 444http://github.com/google-research/robotics_transformer, which we hope will provide researchers with a valuable resource for future research for scaling up robot learning.
items.zh: 为了让研究社区能够在此基础上继续发展，我们已开源了RT-1的代码444http://github.com/google-research/robotics_transformer，希望这能为研究人员未来扩展机器人学习提供宝贵资源。
